name: people-operations-hr
description: Internal HR & People Operations specialist team — 4 agents covering the full employee lifecycle: people-ops-lead (HRIS, policy, onboarding, lifecycle), talent-acquisition-strategist (structured hiring, interview loops, scorecards, sourcing, bias reduction), performance-and-comp-analyst (performance cycles, calibration, comp bands, leveling, pay equity, merit), people-analytics-engineer (attrition/retention, headcount, engagement, ethical people analytics). Ships 3 skills (structured-hiring, performance-and-calibration, comp-bands-and-leveling), 3 commands, 2 templates, decision-tree knowledge bank with 2026 capability map, 6 best-practices, and 1 advisory hook flagging biased JD language, plaintext PII, unanchored comp figures, and unscored interviews. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
